.section-container{-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;user-select:none;background-color:#ecf0f1;text-align:center;line-height:0;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:#a6a6a6;border-bottom-width:1px;position:relative;margin-bottom:2px}.section-container .section-swiper-container{overflow:hidden;width:100%;display:inline-block;padding-left:32px;padding-right:32px}@media(max-width: 480px){.section-container .section-swiper-container{padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px}}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-swiper-wrapper{display:flex}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button{position:absolute;width:32px;height:35px;cursor:pointer;background-color:#ecf0f1;opacity:.8;top:0;z-index:1}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button .section-nav-icon{width:20px;height:35px;fill:rgba(0,0,0,0)}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button .section-nav-icon .st1{fill:none;stroke:#444545;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-miterlimit:10}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button #section-nav-prev-icon{float:left}.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button #section-nav-next-icon{float:right}@media(max-width: 480px){.section-container .section-swiper-container .section-nav-button{display:none !important}}.section-container .section-swiper-container #section-nav-prev-button{left:0}.section-container .section-swiper-container #section-nav-next-button{right:0}.section-container .section-swiper-container .swiper-button-disabled{opacity:.3}.section-container #skip-section-bar{top:-100px}.section-container #skip-section-bar:focus{top:0px}
/* Make clicks pass-through */
#nprogress {
  pointer-events: none;
}

#nprogress .bar {
  background: #29d;

  position: fixed;
  z-index: 1031;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;

  width: 100%;
  height: 2px;
}

/* Fancy blur effect */
#nprogress .peg {
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  right: 0px;
  width: 100px;
  height: 100%;
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px #29d, 0 0 5px #29d;
  opacity: 1.0;

  -webkit-transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
      -ms-transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
          transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
}

/* Remove these to get rid of the spinner */
#nprogress .spinner {
  display: block;
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 1031;
  top: 15px;
  right: 15px;
}

#nprogress .spinner-icon {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  box-sizing: border-box;

  border: solid 2px transparent;
  border-top-color: #29d;
  border-left-color: #29d;
  border-radius: 50%;

  -webkit-animation: nprogress-spinner 400ms linear infinite;
          animation: nprogress-spinner 400ms linear infinite;
}

.nprogress-custom-parent {
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.nprogress-custom-parent #nprogress .spinner,
.nprogress-custom-parent #nprogress .bar {
  position: absolute;
}

@-webkit-keyframes nprogress-spinner {
  0%   { -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
@keyframes nprogress-spinner {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}


#webreader-app{-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;position:relative;height:100%;background-color:#e5e5e5;font-family:"Open Sans",sans-serif;font-size:14px;background-color:#e5e5e5;color:#1f1f1f;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow:hidden}button{border:none;background-color:transparent;background-color:initial}figure{margin:0}*{box-sizing:border-box}*:before,*:after{box-sizing:border-box}#nprogress .bar{background:#fff;z-index:10000;height:4px}#nprogress .spinner{z-index:10000}#nprogress .spinner-icon{border:solid 3px rgba(0,0,0,0);border-top-color:#fff;border-left-color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px}#nprogress .peg{display:none}.skip-link{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:#fff;color:#34495e;padding:12px;z-index:-10000;line-height:1;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s ease-in-out}.skip-link:focus{z-index:20000;opacity:1;outline:3px solid #34495e;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.announce{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;margin:-1px;padding:0;border:0;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0 0 0 0);white-space:nowrap}
.loader-container[data-v-5dc29f2c]{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh;width:100vw;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;background-color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}.loader-container .spinner[data-v-5dc29f2c]{border:5px solid;border-color:#ecf0f1;border-top:5px solid;border-top-color:#34495e;border-radius:50%;width:40px;height:40px;animation:spin-5dc29f2c .8s linear infinite;position:absolute;box-shadow:0 0 1px 2px #ecf0f1}@keyframes spin-5dc29f2c{0%{transform:rotate(0deg)}100%{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
